title: TopsoeГўв‚¬в„ўs Innovative HydroFlexГ‚В® Technology Selected for CountryMarkГўв‚¬в„ўs Indiana Refinery
content: Topsoe, a leading global provider of advanced technology and solutions for the energy transition, has been selected as the renewable diesel technology partner for CountryMarkГўв‚¬в„ўs Mount Vernon, Indiana refinery. Located in southwestern Indiana, the refinery processes 35,000 barrels of crude oil per day. With the addition of TopsoeГўв‚¬в„ўs HydroFlex technology, CountryMark aims to produce up to 250,000 barrels of renewable diesel annually. The new unit is expected to enable an annual emission avoidance of approximately 84,500 tons of CO2e Гўв‚¬вЂњ the equivalent of eliminating emissions from more than 186,000 commercial trucking roundtrips between Indianapolis and Washington D.C.
author: Analysts Account
